summary: The user provided two scene assets (`PixVerse_Image_Effect_prompt...png` and `magnific_use-exact-img...png`) and excerpts from "FULL SCRIPT Aisha ACTS 1-11.pdf" detailing the city gates, a fading magical barrier, approaching caravans, and the arrival of Altair the Royal Hawk. The "Split Grid + Improve Quality" content was again received as HTML webpage code, not usable skill instructions, preventing its immediate application. A decision was made to focus on the script's opening scene, specifically an establishing shot of the city gates. This shot should depict the grandeur of the city walls, the subtle magic of the fading barrier, and the bustling activity of approaching caravans. The next action item is to craft a PixVerse prompt to generate a 2x2 grid for this establishing shot, aiming to capture the "fading magic" effect.
